title: Expansion Strategy in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger expansion strategy in practice judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Expansion Strategy in Practice is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Expansion Strategy in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good expansion strategy in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Expansion Strategy in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
